forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 5pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 76, with temperatures falling to around 71 in the afternoon. South southwest wind around 9 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before midnight, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 59. South southwest wind 12 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 32 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.

forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 5pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 71. West wind around 17 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

sections.header: Traffic Impact: The intersection will be closed to all through traffic
sections.content: . Please follow the posted detour route during construction.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
